title: [West Gov Hospital] Assistant Manager - Finance Costing UP$5.5K #HJA
description:
Responsibilities

  • Liaise and work closely with various stakeholders in performing actual cost calculation and pricing on existing and new services/ projects.
  • Perform annual cost refresh/ updates on services.
  • Work closely with the Project Manager in the rollout of the new costing system with relevant stakeholders.
  • Strong understanding in National Costing Guideline and applying it to the services/ various patient settings.
  • Part of the dynamic team in improvement projects on actual cost calculation, as well as process and efficiencies.
  • Rationalise and formulate pa rice revision proposal in meeting hospital financial sustainability, taking into consideration the patient bill impact.
  • Responsible for the execution and smooth delivery of any revisions in prices with all stakeholders.
  • Support, review, and implement new MOH policies by analysing the hospital’s requirements, including determining feasibility, cost, time, and resources required.
  • Produce concise and value-added reports for regular performance reviews with senior management.
  • Provide Business partnering support to Business Units within a growing regional healthcare system.
  • Support the annual budgeting cycle, including financial review and analysis.
  • Any other ad-hoc duties.

Requirement:

  • Min Bachelor's in Finance/ Accounting
  • 3 - 5 Years Experience in Costing/ Budgeting

TELE me at @yijingggggg or WA me at https://wa.me/+6598623556 NOW!

Interested candidates, please submit your resume to alisonchen@recruitexpress.com.sg

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
